title: noronhia leandriana
intro: Noronhia leandriana, also known as the Madagascar olive or bois de fer, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Noronhia leandriana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and extracts, are commonly used in Madagascar to treat various health conditions.
